articles.title: Iran's Explosive Warning To Trump: 'Any US Violation Will Face Swift Response' | Watch
articles.description: The Iran-U.S. ceasefire is under fresh strain as former IRGC commander Mohsen Rezaee accuses Washington of violating the truce and warns of a "swift and decisive" response. Tehran says recent strikes against U.S. targets were defensive retaliation after American attacks, while the U.S. maintains it acted in response to an Iranian drone strike in the Strait of Hormuz. Will this latest exchange push the region toward another major confrontation? Watch the full report for all the latest developments.

articles.title: Anti-drug awareness rally held in Hubballi
articles.description: Hundreds of students, teachers, and people from different walks of life participated in the Anti-Drug Awareness Rally to sensitise the youths and the general public about the harmful effects of drug abuse in Hubballi on Saturday.

articles.title: 'Not targeted at India': US envoy Sergio Gor defends Trump's H-1B visa changes
articles.description: US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor assured that H-1B visa changes are not India-specific but part of a broader immigration review. He drew parallels with India's stance on illegal migration, emphasizing the US aims to secure its borders. Gor highlighted continued strong people-to-people ties, trade, and defense cooperation, despite the visa program's ongoing adjustments. The US embassy remains a busy hub for visa processing, underscoring the enduring bilateral relationship.

articles.title: 2027 UP polls: Cong should get equal share in alliance, says Rajendra Gautam
articles.description: the newly-appointed All-India Congress Committee in-charge for Uttar Pradesh says he will cover all 75 districts of the state in the next 3 to 4 months

articles.title: BJP questions spending on Gruha Lakshmi implementation committee
articles.description: BJP DK chief Satish Kumpala questions Karnataka govt spending on Gruhalakshmi committees, alleging irregularities, ineligible payouts and seeking probe.

articles.title: Odisha brings back 62 migrant workers after Tamil Nadu gas leak
articles.description: Of the returnees, 58 are from Keonjhar district while others belong to Koraput, Rayagada, Mayurbhanj, and Dhenkanal

articles.title: Nigam Bhandari’s appointment as Kinnaur chief exposes fault lines in Himachal Congress
articles.description: Kinnaur MLA and Tribal Minister Jagat Singh Negi decries move, says it will definitely hit party's performance in 2027 polls.

articles.title: Congress MLA counters KTR's 'false claims' on Pargi development
articles.description: Congress MLA T Ram Mohan Reddy countered BRS's KTR, calling his allegations about a lack of development in Pargi 'false'. Reddy cited the BRS's past unfulfilled promises and highlighted the current government's achievements in housing and farming.

articles.title: New US-Lebanon-Israel agreement signed
articles.description: The Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors announced an agreement on Friday that has been described as a step toward peace after months of cross-border fighting between Israeli forces and the Lebanese militant group Hezbollah. The deal marks a potential breakthrough in efforts to ease tensions following months of conflict. Camille Knight reports.

articles.title: Watch: Ukraine strikes Russian weapons plant with FP-5 Flamingo missiles. What are these 3,000-km strike weapons?
articles.description: Ukraine claims its new FP-5 Flamingo long-range missiles struck the Titan-Barrikady defense facility in Volgograd, a key Russian producer of artillery and missile launchers. President Zelenskyy stated the attack caused a fire at the plant, emphasizing that Russian defense facilities serving the war are legitimate targets. This development highlights Ukraine's expanding indigenous long-range strike capabilities.

articles.title: Pakistan judiciary, army accused of silencing Baloch voices at UNHRC
A cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz targeted by Iran
articles.description: The US military says it has carried out strikes on Iran in response to a drone attack on a cargo ship, after President Donald Trump blamed Tehran for the incident in the Strait of Hormuz and described it as a "foolish violation" of the ceasefire. The escalation comes at a particularly delicate moment, as Washington and Tehran continue negotiations aimed at securing an interim peace agreement. Caitlin Brown and Marion Meyer report.

articles.title: ‘Please Pick Up Call': US 'Surrenders' After IRGC's Strike On American Bases? JD Vance Fumes | Watch
articles.description: The fragile ceasefire between the United States and Iran appears to be on the brink after fresh military exchanges in and around the Strait of Hormuz. U.S. Vice President JD Vance issued a stern warning, declaring that "violence will be met with violence," after Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claimed to have targeted U.S. military positions in the Middle East. Meanwhile, President Donald Trump vowed that America would respond at a time of its choosing, saying, "You'll find out." As Washington and Tehran trade accusations over recent strikes, fears are mounting that the region could be heading toward another dangerous escalation. Watch the full report for the latest developments.

articles.title: When low IV makes option selling difficult: Shubham Agarwal
articles.description: When you sell an option in a low IV environment, your responsibilities do not shrink with the premium. You still block the same margin. You still carry overnight risk. You still need to monitor the position, manage stop losses, and react to news.

articles.title: West Bengal Government Plans UCC, Anti-'Love Jihad' Law; TMC Calls Move Divisive
articles.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari says the BJP government will soon bring the Uniform Civil Code and strict laws against "love jihad", "land jihad" and forceful religious conversion. The announcement has sparked a fresh political showdown, with the TMC strongly opposing the move.

articles.title: Can a gift of shares between spouses create tax trouble?
articles.description: As per the income tax laws, gifts received from certain specified relatives, including one’s spouse, are not treated as income irrespective of the quantum of the gifts received

articles.title: Tamil actor-director K Bhagyaraj dies at 73
articles.description: Tamil cinema mourns the loss of K. Bhagyaraj, a versatile filmmaker and actor, who passed away at 73. Known as a "one-man studio," Bhagyaraj excelled as a director, writer, composer, and actor, leaving behind a legacy of popular films like 'Mundhanai Mudichu'. His ability to master multiple roles in his productions was a rare feat. He also ventured into writing and editing, and was set to return to directing.

articles.description: Responsibilities that traditionally were associated with systems integrators and IT services firms, now sit at the centre of that transition i.e., FDEs working at frontier AI labs.

articles.description: According to a press release issued by the MEA on Friday, Prime Minister Takaichi will visit Delhi at the invitation of Prime Minister Narendra Modi from July 1 to 3, during which she will take part in the annual summit.

articles.title: Middle East War: US strikes Iran after Trump says ceasefire was violated
articles.description: The US struck Iran on Friday to respond to a drone attack on a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz, a provocation that US President Donald Trump said violated the ceasefire. The British military said Thursday that a vessel was hit by a projectile off Oman. This comes at a fragile time for the US and Iranian negotiations over interim peace deal. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.
